definition:
δεῦρο 
 adv., [in LXX chiefly for לֵךְ, לֵכָה ;] 
  1. of place; 
   (a) hither, with verbs of motion; 
   (b) (in cl. chiefly poët.) as an imperat., here! come!: Mat.19:21, Mrk.10:21, Luk.18:22, Jhn.11:43, Act.7:3" (LXX) , 34 (LXX), Rev.17:1 21:9. 
   2. Of time, hitherto, now: Rev.1:13.†
 (AS)
